items.title: Virtual Home Tours
items.description: High-quality video walkthroughs and live virtual showings so you can explore homes before you arrive.

items.title: Neighborhood Guides
items.description: Detailed school district comparisons, commute maps, and lifestyle guides tailored to your family's priorities.

items.title: Settlement Support
items.description: Utility setup, contractor referrals, and local recommendations to help you settle in quickly.

data.title: Planning a Move?
data.subtitle: Let me help make your relocation stress-free.

data.bio: Elena Vasquez specializes in helping families relocate to the Newark and Montclair area. Bilingual in English and Spanish, she provides end-to-end relocation support — from virtual tours and school comparisons to settlement assistance after move-in. She's helped over 40 families make successful out-of-state moves.
